'''âf-y-t-v''' ('''kafaytevoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jail|jail]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-y-t-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jail|jail]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-y-t-v
|-
! Lemma
| kafaytevoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifaytevoko|thifaytevoko]] || [[word:jifaytevoko|jifaytevoko]] || [[word:shifaytevoko|shifaytevoko]] || [[word:kifaytevoko|kifaytevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufaytevoko|thuthufaytevoko]] || [[word:jujufaytevoko|jujufaytevoko]] || [[word:shushufaytevoko|shushufaytevoko]] || [[word:kukufaytevoko|kukufaytevoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
